templates.name: Story Starter Template
templates.description: Template for generating creative fiction with structured prompts

example.setting: A generation ship 300 years into a 500-year journey to a distant star
example.protagonist: A historian who discovers that the ship's original navigation data has been secretly altered
example.conflict: Revealing the truth could cause civil unrest, but the ship is heading toward the wrong star system
example.opening_line: The archives were supposed to be quiet, but today they hummed with a frequency that made Elara's teeth ache.

templates.name: Poetry Composition Template
templates.description: Template for generating poetry with specific structural constraints

example.form: Villanelle (19 lines, specific rhyme scheme ABA with refrains)
example.theme: The passage of time and impermanence
constraints: Rhyme scheme: ABA for tercets, ABAA for quatrain

templates.name: Marketing Copy Template
templates.description: Template for persuasive marketing and advertising content

example.audience: Remote workers and freelancers aged 25-40 who struggle with distractions
example.uvp: The only productivity app that learns your work patterns and proactively shields your focus time
benefits: AI identifies your peak productivity hours automatically
Smart notification blocking during deep work sessions
Weekly focus reports with actionable insights
Integrates with Slack, Calendar, and todo apps
example.cta: Start your free 14-day trial — no credit card required

templates.name: Worldbuilding Template
templates.description: Template for constructing detailed fictional worlds

example.core_concept: A world where magic is drawn from a finite resource — crystalized memories — forcing societies to choose between preserving history and wielding power

elements.name: Geography
elements.prompt: Describe the major landmasses, climate zones, and how memory crystals form in different environments

elements.name: Societies
elements.prompt: Describe the three major civilizations and their relationship with memory crystals

elements.name: Magic System
elements.prompt: Explain how memories are extracted, crystalized, and consumed for magical effects

elements.name: Conflict
elements.prompt: What is the central tension driving the world's major conflicts?

templates.name: Dialogue Scene Template
templates.description: Template for crafting character-driven dialogue scenes

characters.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
characters.description: Brilliant but cautious research lead, worried about ethical implications

characters.name: Marcus Webb
characters.description: Ambitious junior researcher who made the breakthrough discovery

example.setting: A dimly lit laboratory at 11 PM, monitors casting blue light
example.situation: Marcus has discovered their AI model has achieved something unexpected and wants to publish immediately; Sarah insists on more testing
example.subtext: Both know this discovery could redefine their field, but neither is ready to admit what it might cost
